season_dates.note: USAU publishes weekly Algorithm rankings starting July 29, 2026. The Final Regular Season Rankings (season end) are what determine regional bid allocation and Regionals seeding.

bid_allocation_rules.strength_bid_process: After each region's automatic bid, remaining 'strength bids' are awarded one at a time to whichever region has the next-highest-ranked team not yet allocated a bid, based on the Final Regular Season Rankings.
